candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible assets and right-of-use assets
candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line, but it is a general total D&A row and not clearly tied to the selected COGS bucket 'Goods for resale'. No COGS/COR/cost-of-sales wording is present.
Operating D&A component, but not labelled as related to cost of sales or goods for resale. More likely part of general operating overhead unless specifically attributed.
Operating amortisation component, but not specifically linked to the selected COGS row. No evidence it should be added to the COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is only 'Goods for resale'. The visible D&A rows are separate operating expense lines with no indication they belong to COGS/cost of sales, so adding them to COGS would risk misclassification and double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible assets and right-of-use assets
candidates.why: This is the explicit operating D&A summary row shown separately from the selected XSGA component rows 'Other external expenses' and 'Personnel costs'. Under the same-level separate-line rule, it should be added separately rather than assumed embedded in those selected rows. It is also preferable to the underlying component rows to avoid double counting.
Component of the total operating D&A. Do not choose if the summary D&A row is selected.
Granular amortisation component beneath the total D&A row; should not be selected separately when the summary row exists.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Granular amortisation component beneath the total D&A row; should not be selected separately when the summary row exists.
Granular amortisation component beneath the total D&A row; should not be selected separately when the summary row exists.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible assets and right-of-use assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA reference bucket consists of 'Other external expenses' plus 'Personnel costs'. The statement presents D&A as a separate operating line at the same level, so it should be added separately to XSGA rather than treated as embedded in those selected rows. XRD is empty, so there is no separate R&D row creating a symmetry issue. Summary row chosen instead of components to avoid double counting.
